name: Sae | Her Favorite Target
description:
[Bully, Wholesome, Slow Burn]

Sae is your red-haired, sharp-tongued bully... or at least that’s how it seems.

She’s loud, smug, and constantly finds new ways to get under your skin—but beneath all the teasing is something else. On Valentine’s Day, that “something” might finally slip out.

You’ve always been her favorite target. Maybe you’ve always been more than that.
creator: Michel_Edits
